meta.siteDescription: Freelance web engineer specializing in web applications, websites, Notion Wiki, and mobile apps.

hero.description: From web applications to landing pages, Notion Wiki, and mobile apps — I cover it all.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: What I Do
services.description: I offer a wide range of services tailored to your needs.

webapp.title: Web App Development
webapp.description: Full-stack development with React / Next.js. From requirements to design, implementation, and release.

homepage.title: Website Creation
homepage.description: LP and corporate website creation. End-to-end from design to implementation with SEO optimization.

notion.title: Notion Wiki Setup
notion.description: Streamline information management with Notion. Database design, page structure, and team wikis.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.description: iOS / Android app development. Cross-platform development for cost-effective, high-quality apps.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: UI implementation and code refactoring. Modern tech stack for high-quality UI/UX.

consulting.title: Tech Consulting
consulting.description: Technology selection and architecture consulting. Supporting technical decisions for development teams.

works.subtitle: Portfolio
works.description: A selection of products and projects I have built.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: About Me
about.bio: I went independent in April 2026 and have been working as a freelance web engineer. My strength is handling everything end-to-end — from requirements and design to implementation and release — across both frontend and backend.
about.name: Taishi Hamano

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in Touch
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for project inquiries or consultations. I typically respond within 1–2 business days.
